package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for toctou_file_check_then_open: `os.Stat(path)` or file existence check followed by `os.Open(path)` or `os.Create(path)` without atomic operations
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario742Negative(path string) (*os.File, error) {
	return os.OpenFile(path, os.O_RDONLY, 0)
}
